metadata.description: Utah 2026 cougar hunt opportunities dataset built from the official Utah DWR hunt table.
assumptionNotes: Cougar rows with hunt code prefixes other than CG were excluded.
Cougar pursuit, spot and stalk, and control rows use planner weapon labels to keep filtering readable.
When the official table had no season text, the planner shows See official hunt details.
